description: PayerRT_Copilot.HostedAgent observability workbook (Stream D.2). Wired by tools/deploy_data_agents.py when APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING is set; service.name='PayerRT_Copilot' filters the queries.

content.json:
# PayerRT_Copilot.HostedAgent
Real-time ops triage. Routes UM / CareMgmt / SIU signals. **Routing only** — the recommendation enum is locked to `dispatch_outreach`, `open_pa_investigation`, `open_siu_case`, `monitor`.

Governance: phi_minimization=required, decision_authority=deny, audit_log=required.

content.query: requests | where cloud_RoleName == 'PayerRT_Copilot' | summarize Invocations = count(), P50_ms = percentile(duration, 50), P95_ms = percentile(duration, 95), P99_ms = percentile(duration, 99) by bin(timestamp, 5m) | render timechart
content.title: Invocations & latency (p50/p95/p99)

content.query: dependencies | where cloud_RoleName == 'PayerRT_Copilot' and name in ('get_pa_latency_window','get_emergency_admit_worklist','get_siu_suspect_claims','ask_um_agent','ask_care_mgmt_agent','ask_siu_agent') | summarize Calls = count(), Failures = countif(success == false), SuccessRate = round(100.0 * countif(success == true) / count(), 2) by name | order by Calls desc
content.title: Tool-call success rate (6 tools)

content.query: customEvents | where cloud_RoleName == 'PayerRT_Copilot' and name == 'agent_response' | extend persona = tostring(customDimensions.persona), recommendation = tostring(customDimensions.recommendation) | summarize Count = count() by persona, recommendation | order by Count desc
content.title: Persona x recommendation distribution

content.query: customEvents | where cloud_RoleName == 'PayerRT_Copilot' and name == 'agent_response' | extend recommendation = tostring(customDimensions.recommendation), reason = tostring(customDimensions.reason) | summarize Total = count(), MonitorOnly = countif(recommendation == 'monitor'), Refusals = countif(reason has 'decision_authority' or reason has 'phi') by bin(timestamp, 1h) | render timechart
content.title: Refusal & monitor-only rate

content.query: exceptions | where cloud_RoleName == 'PayerRT_Copilot' | summarize Errors = count() by type, outerMessage | top 20 by Errors desc
content.title: Top 20 errors
